title: wedelia hispidula
intro: Wedelia hispidula, also known as the hairy wedelia or sweet-scented buttonbush, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Wedelia hispidula include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Wedelia hispidula is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, and can be found in various forms, including capsules and tinctures.
